chapter_title.en: Chapter on Days and Times Recommended for Travel and Days and Times Disliked for Travel

text: 2390 - وَ رَوَى إِبْرَاهِيمُ بْنُ أَبِي يَحْيَى اَلْمَدِينِيُّ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : «لاَ بَأْسَ بِالْخُرُوجِ فِي اَلسَّفَرِ لَيْلَةَ اَلْجُمُعَةِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2390 - Ibrahim ibn Abi Yahya al-Madani narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as): "There is no harm in setting out on a journey on the night of Friday."
